channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 18th March
item.description:
Grid locked for an hour and half. Please can someone explain to me why and get down here and sort it out. Police have said this is down to GCC and are not helping.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of clothes bags and rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
There has been a large amount of clothing bags and rubbish bags dumped by the old clothing bins in the Bath Terrace car park. This is starting to be targeted by scavengers and those known to police, causing risk to local neighbours as they are strong to congregate rifling through it all. Please arrange collection and removal urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide pothole next to substation, 18th March
item.description:
Located opposite No 62 at junction with Hospital Road. Located in cycleway in centre of road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Keynsham Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Developing pothole in centre of road/ cycleway, 18th March
item.description:
Located next to substation in centre of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Keynsham Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole near substation in centre of road, 18th March
item.description:
In centre of road/cycleway next to existing manhole cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Keynsham Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Developing pothole in centre of carriageway/cycleway, 18th March
item.description:
Centre of road in front of of house No 88

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Keynsham Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos fly tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Fly tippers are dumping rubbish at the back of our houses and there are asbestos

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Coombe Glen Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rattling manhole cover, 18th March
item.description:
On the lefthand side as you turn into sandford mill road from London road, as if you're heading into town. On the corner of 125 London road, I understand that road works are due this evening but they don't include this issue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Sandford Mill Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped radiator, 18th March
item.description:
Fly tipped radiator

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, London Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of electrical equipment including fridges and commercial printer as well as other items, 18th March
item.description:
Both sides of the road immediately south of the disused railway bridge on the first turning right off the A436 – lane leading to Syreford.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Syreford Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Large Inspection cover raised, 18th March
item.description:
On the raised pavement opposite the entrance to Baytree Nursing Home The large inspection cover is not fitted into its recess and has raised up causing a serious trip hazard to pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, High Street, Noverton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left after Gold Cup week, 18th March
item.description:
All along the new cyclepath there are bottles and drinks cans and bags of rubbish left after race week. It looks terrible and a simple litter pick would sort it out. Doesn't look very smart as main road into cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
